jd_summary: Professional-level HR Generalist for a home-care company, supporting designated HR programs across comp/benefits/leave, employee relations, progressive discipline, investigations, I-9 compliance, onboarding/offboarding, and unemployment claims. Works closely with senior HR management and operations managers; ~10% travel, no direct reports.

key_points.one_liner: At-level HR Generalist (3 yrs), $62-75K, Clackamas OR - broad generalist scope with employee relations.
must_have_skills: Demonstrated interpersonal communication, presentation, and organizational skills
Technical proficiency in utilizing computers and generating reports
Excellent negotiation and conflict resolution skills
PHR or SHRM-CP certification preferred; Bachelor's degree preferred
